title: After God enters Reis Third Eye
display_title: After God enters Reis Third Eye
wikitext:
[]: After God enters Rei's Third Eye...             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Aug 15, 2005 2:04 pm Look into Descartes and the seat of souls/pineal gland. DELETED.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Aug 22, 2005 2:54 pm Well using this as a reference, the scene in EoE with the Tree of Life penetrating into Rei's third eye makes more sense. In that, after Shinji enters Rei's pineal gland (thrid eye) he is within Rei's 'seat of the soul' or her thoughts, which is nearly everyone's thoughts at that moment during 3rdI. This helps to explain the confusion (the muddled minds) directly after this happens in the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Aug 22, 2005 3:06 pm That's interesting. I need time to digest this. Again we must be cautious about applying outside references to NGE, but the points you mention about GNR's third eye are intruiging.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Aug 22, 2005 4:12 pm The only problem is that the pineal gland is not like the core, as it is divided in half, but otherwise, this sounds rather interesting

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Aug 23, 2005 12:33 pm another thing popped into my head, i think i remember reading someplace that the pineal gland is connected to the opitic nerve? that would help explain why eva 01 burst out of Rei's eye, following the nerve from there... *ponders* sadsadshinji wrote: The only problem is that the pineal gland is not like the core, as it is divided in half, but otherwise, this sounds rather interesting

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Aug 23, 2005 2:14 pm Well, the Wikipedia entry states that it IS the third eye (that is sometimes found in lizards...forgot which type) and responds to light stimulation with the release of melantonin... I suppose that makes the "third eye" of GNR make more sense...in a way

[]:             Quote Post by akda1ndaonly1 » Tue Aug 23, 2005 5:57 pm sadsadshinji wrote: The only problem is that the pineal gland is not like the core, as it is divided in half, but otherwise, this sounds rather interesting

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Aug 23, 2005 8:47 pm If anything, thats a vaginal reference, just ask reichu

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Aug 24, 2005 10:40 pm gata agree most of it is vaginal, anno loves the puss puss look.
